cms.task_text: Seřaďte bloky tak, aby želva nakreslila [hlp]čtverec o straně 60 bodů[/hlp].
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="1" x="20" y="20"></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="2" x="200" y="40"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block><block type="turtle_right" id="3" x="100" y="110"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="4" x="260" y="130"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block><block type="turtle_right" id="5" x="30" y="200"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="6" x="190" y="220"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block><block type="turtle_right" id="7" x="110" y="290"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="8" x="280" y="270"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="1" x="50" y="50"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="2"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="3"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="4"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="5"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="6"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="7"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="8"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
